mapper.sql: p.id, p.project_id, p.plan_name, p.term_year, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.train_address, p.teacher_id, p.second_teacher_id, p.max_student, p.enroll_num, p.enroll_start, p.enroll_end, p.plan_status, p.remark, p.create_time, p.update_time, pr.project_name as project_name, u.username as teacher_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM train_plan p LEFT JOIN train_project pr ON p.project_id = pr.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.teacher_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO train_plan (project_id, plan_name, term_year, start_date, end_date, train_address, teacher_id, second_teacher_id, max_student, enroll_num, enroll_start, enroll_end, plan_status, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{planName}, #{termYear}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{trainAddress}, #{teacherId}, #{secondTeacherId}, #{maxStudent}, #{enrollNum}, #{enrollStart}, #{enrollEnd}, #{planStatus}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM train_plan WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE train_plan SET enroll_num = enroll_num + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE train_plan SET enroll_num = GREATEST(enroll_num - 1, 0), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
